author_identification.canonical_name_ar: سليمان بن أحمد بن أيوب بن مطير اللخمي الشامي، أبو القاسم الطبراني
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent hadith scholar and compiler, known for his extensive collections of hadith.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: Part of the broader tradition of hadith compilation in the Islamic sciences.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Contributes to the corpus of hadith literature, particularly in the transmission of narratives involving miracles and interactions with the Prophet Muhammad.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: عبد الله ضيف الله العامري is a known editor with experience in hadith texts, though specific reputation details are not provided.
